title: stelis scaberula
intro: Stelis scaberula, also known as the Rough Stelis, is a type of orchid species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a flowering plant that has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stelis scaberula include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms such as sore throats, coughs, and colds. In traditional herbal preparations, Stelis scaberula is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
